_readme: Edit this file and push to git. status.stluker.com rebuilds in ~30s. Valid status values: live | prog | plan | risk. Risk factors: orphaned | noRepo | noCICD | depPause | depQuota | wiring | undeployed

services.title: stluker.com / www
services.summary: Main ecosystem site and front door.

services.title: sports.stluker.com
services.summary: STL/7 — rolling 7-day St. Louis sports slate. Live, but deploys are still manual Wrangler pushes.

services.title: music.stluker.com
services.summary: STL/Music — 7-day concerts, comedy & theater slate. Weekly pulse pushed to KV by hand.

services.title: memory.stluker.com
services.summary: Knowledge tool. Live on Pages; Supabase persistence not yet wired.

services.title: fire.stluker.com
services.summary: Fire intel dashboard — the FIRE / retirement front end.

services.title: fire-api.stluker.com
services.summary: Backend API powering the fire intel dashboard. Routed through AI Gateway with max_uses capping.

services.title: trip.stluker.com
services.summary: Trip Companion planner. Open: export photos from the app; add custom-domain CNAME.

services.title: reunion.stluker.com
services.summary: Reunion / event page with RSVP. Resend confirmation emails not wired yet.

services.title: family.stluker.com
services.summary: Family hub. Repo familyplate → worker family. Supabase auth wiring needs confirming.

services.title: ptodashboard.stluker.com
services.summary: PTO dashboard — CNAME onto the same barrettspto worker.

services.title: pokelab.stluker.com
services.summary: Pokémon lab tool. Source recovered and backed up to GitHub repo.

services.title: trains.stluker.com
services.summary: ironrails transit tracker. Source recovered and backed up to GitHub repo.

services.title: surf.stluker.com
services.summary: Surfcam viewer. Built for dad, parked — running but no active work needed.

services.title: surfcam.stluker.com
services.summary: Surfcam Pages + surfflow-scoring API. Most active worker (15-min cron, YouTube ingest).

services.title: geo.stluker.com
services.summary: Geo/map tool. Repo exists, deployment deferred.

services.title: media.stluker.com
services.summary: Media gallery — Cloudinary + R2. Concept only, no app yet.

backlog.txt: Cloudflare cron → ping Supabase every 5 days to prevent free-tier pause
Wire Resend into the reunion worker for confirmation emails
Connect Git repo to stl-sports worker for CI/CD
Connect Git + automate the weekly music pulse (scraper/cron → MUSIC_KV)
Export photos from the Trip Companion app
Cache YouTube API responses in Workers KV (quota risk)
Recover & back up orphaned worker source to GitHub
Route through AI Gateway, cap web_search max_uses, add refresh rate limit
Cross-link nav across stluker, family, sports & music
DNS delegated to Cloudflare · Resend verified · DMARC added
